_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Cave World Revelation. Canon event: Wang Lin discovers the Cave World is an artificial Joss Flame farm. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Cave World Revelation
canon_event: Wang Lin discovers the Cave World is an artificial Joss Flame farm
why_untaken: Requires Immortal-tier perception to comprehend the truth.
natural_next_event: The Seven-Colored Daoist continues harvesting Joss Flame.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
